\section{E.2 Naming conventions}
\label{ch:app_e_figures:e-2-naming-conventions}

\begin{itemize}
\item Main figures: \texttt{fig\{N\}\_\allowbreak{}\{k\}\_\allowbreak{}descriptive\_\allowbreak{}name.\allowbreak{}png}  
\item Auxiliary: \texttt{aux\{N\}\_\allowbreak{}\{k\}\_\allowbreak{}.\allowbreak{}.\allowbreak{}.\allowbreak{}} or \texttt{aux\_\allowbreak{}z\_\allowbreak{}map\_\allowbreak{}*.\allowbreak{}png}  
\item In LaTeX: \texttt{\textbackslash{}includegraphics\{.\allowbreak{}.\allowbreak{}.\allowbreak{}\}} with \texttt{graphicspath} \(\rightarrow\) \texttt{figures/\allowbreak{}}  
\item Labels: \texttt{\textbackslash{}label\{fig:\allowbreak{}filename-stem\}}
\end{itemize}

\bigskip
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
\bigskip
